text:
Continental Street (, Konchinentaru-dōri) is a street located in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 110 

Overview

Half of the Phantom Troupe members walk down this street. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

As Killua and Melody tail the Phantom Troupe, the group heads west and passes by the Motoba Building on Continental Street.
